title: Dry Roasted Ethiopian Lamb Skewers
description: A sweet and savory Ethiopian dish featuring lamb skewers with juniper berries and a char-grill flavor, perfect for a dinner meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the crushed juniper berries, brown sugar, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the skewers with vegetable oil and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast the skewers in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until the lamb is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees Fahrenheit.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
